benefits.description: Pain reduced by 90% following microdiscectomy; able to walk freely, lay flat, and sit up the day of discharge

side_effects.description: Lingering symptoms from prolonged nerve compression expected to take time to resolve

protocol_notes: Had herniated extruded L5 pressing on sciatic nerve for approximately 1 year before surgery. Started TB-500 and BPC-157 a few days after surgery (not pre-op). At 5 weeks post-op when reporting, just starting physical therapy again. Plans to take a break from BPC/TB500 after protocol ends, then start KPV before resuming BPC/TB500 with nightly GHK-Cu for scar healing. Previously hospitalized for 9 days pre-op on IV narcotics due to severe pain.
